title: Immigration and our local economies - Canada.ca
content:
## Immigration and our local economies
Immigrants contribute to our economy, fill specific labour gaps and help address challenges like building new homes and providing quality health care.
To find out how immigrants affect our local economies, we look at how immigration supports economic growth and population structure in communities across Canada.

## See how immigration contributes to our local economies
